title: Disabled Veterans Property Tax Exemption
summary: Illinois provides a property tax exemption for qualifying disabled veterans based on VA disability rating.

requirements.notes: Exemption amount increases at 50% and 70% disability levels.

eligibilityNotes: Veterans must have a service-connected disability of at least 30%. Apply through the local County Assessor.

title: Illinois Veterans Grant (IVG)
summary: Tuition and mandatory fee assistance for eligible Illinois veterans attending public colleges and universities.

requirements.notes: Requires qualifying active duty service and Illinois residency.

eligibilityNotes: Covers tuition and certain fees at Illinois public institutions. Does not cover housing or books.

title: Illinois MIA/POW Scholarship
summary: Education benefits for dependents of veterans who are deceased, disabled, MIA, or POW.

requirements.notes: Applies to dependents of qualifying veterans.

eligibilityNotes: Provides tuition assistance at Illinois public institutions for eligible dependents.

title: Reduced-Fee Hunting and Fishing Licenses for Disabled Veterans
summary: Illinois offers reduced-cost hunting and fishing licenses for qualifying disabled veterans.

requirements.notes: Must be an Illinois resident with a service-connected disability.

eligibilityNotes: Licenses are issued through the Illinois Department of Natural Resources.

title: Veteran Designation on Illinois Driver License / ID
summary: Eligible veterans may add a Veteran designation to an Illinois driver license or state ID.

requirements.notes: Requires proof of honorable service (e.g., DD-214).

eligibilityNotes: Veterans must present documentation at a Secretary of State facility.

title: Illinois Veterans Homes
summary: Long-term care facilities providing skilled nursing and assisted living services for eligible veterans.

requirements.notes: Admission depends on medical need, eligibility determination, and bed availability.

eligibilityNotes: Illinois operates multiple Veterans Homes throughout the state.

title: Illinois Veterans Cemeteries
summary: State-operated cemeteries providing burial options for eligible veterans and family members.

requirements.notes: Eligibility generally mirrors VA national cemetery eligibility.

eligibilityNotes: Includes multiple cemetery locations across Illinois.
